rules: Use 'Outfit' for all headings to establish a modern, geometric brand voice.
Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for all body text for high legibility.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase with wide tracking.

restrictions: Do NOT use Teal (#14B8A6) for primary CTAs (use Sky Blue).
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Slate 900 (#0F172A).
Avoid heavy dark modes; prioritize a 'Clean White' aesthetic.

rules: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
Marketing pages must use 'Lenis' smooth scrolling.
Dashboards should use a sidebar layout on desktop and bottom nav on mobile.
Always use 'container' classes for consistent max-width.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-sky-500/20 hover:shadow-sky-500/30 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all

cards.feature: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-xl p-6 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm
cards.order_status: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border-l-4 border-sky-500 shadow-sm

inputs.default: rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500/20 transition-all h-12

navigation.mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-100 p-4 pb-8 safe-area-bottom z-50
navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-100 p-6 hidden md:flex flex-col z-40

visual_enhancers.patterns: Use subtle dot patterns or wave SVGs in backgrounds for 'laundry' metaphor.

principles: Staggered entrance for lists and grids.
Micro-interactions on all clickable elements (scale down on press).

media.image_style: Bright, high-key photography. Focus on clean textiles, smiling people, and neatly folded clothes.

assets.logo: Use a text-based logo with a simple icon (e.g., a sparkle or wave).

hero_main.alt: Neatly stacked pile of fresh colored clothes

happy_customer.alt: Happy woman smiling under clear sky

rules: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1 on light backgrounds.
Focus states must be clearly visible (ring-2 ring-sky-500).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Layout Wrapper first: A 'Layout' component that handles the sidebar/bottom-nav based on user role and screen size.
Use 'Outlet' from react-router-dom for nested routes.
Create a 'ProtectedRoute' component to handle role-based access (Customer vs Driver vs Provider).
Use the provided image URLs for the Landing Page and Dashboard placeholders.
For the Map view, use a placeholder 'div' with a grey/blue map-like background pattern if a real map library (like leaflet) is not yet integrated, or use 'react-leaflet' if possible.
Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use default Tailwind blue; use the specific Sky Blue (#0EA5E9).
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
